message: Support running tests manually in CI

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+name: Tests
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  tenzir-test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Check out repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Run tenzir-test via Docker
+        run: |
+          docker run --rm \
+            -e UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache \
+            -e XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/xdg-data \
+            -v "${{ github.workspace }}:/workspace" \
+            -w /workspace \
+            --entrypoint uv \
+            tenzir/tenzir tool run tenzir-test .
